researched_category.notes: Zoho CRM is a cloud-based CRM platform for managing sales, marketing, and customer support.

one_liner.value: Cloud-based CRM platform for managing sales, marketing, and customer support operations with a comprehensive REST API for programmatic access.

methods.notes: Primary method is OAuth 2.0 (authorization code grant). Also supports Self Client (client credentials grant) for internal apps, and API Key auth for serverless functions.

access.notes: Free tier exists (3 users, 5,000 API credits/day). Developer can register a client at the Zoho API Console (api-console.zoho.com) with just a free account. No paid plan required to get API credentials. Higher API limits require paid plans.

summary.value: Zoho CRM has a well-documented V8 REST API covering Core CRUD operations on all CRM modules, Metadata APIs, Bulk asynchronous APIs, Notification webhooks, COQL query language, and a Composite API for batching requests. Also supports GraphQL. Official SDKs exist for Java, Python, PHP, Node.js, C#, Ruby, JavaScript, Android, and iOS.

agent_interface.notes: Zoho CRM provides 4 pre-built official MCP servers (Data Insights, Data Operations, Module Customization, Workflow & Process Automation). A community MCP server also exists on GitHub (junnaisystems/zoho-crm-mcp). Composio has a Zoho CRM toolkit with managed OAuth and hosted MCP.

rationale.value: Zoho CRM is fully buildable as an agent toolkit today. It has a well-documented public REST API (V8), official OAuth 2.0 authentication that works for programmatic access, self-serve developer credentials available with a free account, and even provides official pre-built MCP servers. The API surface is broad (CRUD, metadata, bulk, notifications, COQL query, GraphQL) and suitable for agentic workflows. Composio already has a Zoho CRM toolkit integration. No material blockers exist.

s1.quote: Zoho CRM V8 APIs - Perform CRUD operations on CRM module entities... Metadata APIs, Core APIs, Composite API, Bulk APIs, Notification APIs, Query APIs
s1.title: Zoho CRM V8 APIs

s2.quote: The Zoho CRM API uses the OAuth 2.0 protocol for authentication.

s7.quote: Core APIs, Bulk APIs, Notification APIs, Query APIs, GraphQL APIs, Java SDK, Python SDK, PHP SDK, Node JS SDK, C# SDK, Ruby SDK, JavaScript SDK, Android SDK, iOS SDK

s9.quote: Zoho CRM MCP servers connect your AI tools to Zoho CRM using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). They expose CRM capabilities as tools... Zoho CRM provides these as pre-built MCP servers.

s10.quote: A comprehensive Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for seamless integration with Zoho CRM.
s10.title: GitHub - junnaisystems/Zoho-CRM-MCP

s11.quote: Zoho is a suite of cloud applications including CRM... Composio maintains and updates all toolkit integrations automatically.
s11.title: Zoho MCP Integration for AI Agents | Composio

limitations: The API credits system means the free tier is limited to 5,000 credits/day, but paid plans scale this significantly.
Some advanced features (webhooks, blueprints, custom functions) require Professional or higher paid plans.
